Last Week At The Iron

The 'gram was good this week 📸

We hauled the waffle iron out, made a mess of whipped feta, and somehow still had people ask for seconds before we finished plating firsts. Here's what you might've missed if you're not following along yet.

This week's chaffle games

🤔 Would You Rather

Sweet chaffle for breakfast every day for a year, or savory chaffle for lunch every day for a year? Reply and tell us — we're keeping score.

📸 Caption This

We'll post a behind-the-iron photo on Instagram every Friday. Best caption in the comments gets a shoutout in next week's Weekly Waffle.

🎬 Chaffle & Chill: Online Movie Night

Grab your own chaffles, hop on our Instagram Live, and watch a feel-good flick with the Chaffle-lujah crew. Snack-along instructions included.
